prompt_used: Story: The Harvest Men (the-harvest-men) | Hook: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight. | Subgenre: folk horror | Tone: SLOW_BURN | Location: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds | Villain: The Reaper Steward | Villain worldview: Communities survive only through chosen sacrifice. | Motifs: corn husk knots, lantern smoke, harvest blades.
